customAttributes.description: T: Choose target spell or ability that targets a permanent you control. Then ask a person outside the game if the story of what will happen makes sense. If they say no, sacrifice Flavor Judge and counter that spell or ability.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 2/29/2020. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: “…and now they’re trying to make a brick wall on my property fight a dinosaur to the death.”
